content:
❤️ This 80-Year-Old Still Works 12 hours Every Day.
Reason Will Touch Your Heart. 🥺

Meet Rabindranath Sarkar , Taxi Driver from Kolkata.

Even at the age of 80, he continues to drive a taxi for long hours every day—not for wealth or luxury.

He works to help pay for his wife's medical treatment. ❤️ 

His story reminds us that true love isn't just about saying "I love you."

It's about standing beside someone, even during the hardest days.

One ❤️ for Rabindranath Sarkar and his unconditional love...

Follow Shashi Jha for Workplace Truth 🙏 

Pls share your opinion 🙏
comment: Stories like this also highlight a gap we often overlook: aging workers need stronger social support systems so care responsibilities don't force impossible choices.
